one_line: Two arb funds initiated large passive stakes near 52-week lows (Rush Island 7.6% Dec-2025, Gumshoe Capital 5.1% Jan-2026) playing liquidation NAV discount; no insider buying and Vanguard reporting 0 shares caps conviction.

citations.fact: Rush Island Master LP et al filed 13G/A Feb 17 2026 (event date Dec 31 2025) reporting 7.6% stake — 3,989,634 shares — passive, no control intent; entered near stock lows around $6-7
Gumshoe Capital Management LLC (Eric Wolff) filed 13G Mar 25 2026 (event date Jan 26 2026) reporting 5.1% stake — 2,672,797 shares — passive; new position initiated during wind-down phase
CAO Scott Alexander Form 4 Feb 22 2026: 141 shares disposed at $6.65 for tax withholding (Code F) — no open-market insider buys found
EVP/General Counsel Aaron Kitlowski Form 4 Feb 28 2026: 3,916 shares disposed at $6.16 for tax withholding (Code F) — confirms no management open-market buying in the liquidation
Vanguard amended 13G/A reporting 0 shares — large passive index fund exiting as SITC falls out of indices during wind-down, creating forced selling that arb funds are absorbing
